summary: Tested In-App Messaging & Notifications V1. All 9 requested features verified working: Send Message API creates thread+message, Inbox API returns threads with unread counts, Thread View API returns messages and marks as read, Reply API adds to thread, Unread Count API for badge display, Timeline logging of support_message_sent events, Idempotency when sending to existing thread_id, Frontend Send Message modal from Support Pod, and Frontend Messages Page with thread list, conversation view, and reply.

issues: Messages nav item only visible for athlete role (by design). Coaches access messages via Support Pod → Email action bar button.

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed message threads during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Support Messages feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/support-messages (creates thread+message), GET /api/support-messages/inbox (threads with unread), GET /api/support-messages/thread/{id} (messages + marks read), POST /api/support-messages/{id}/reply (add to thread), GET /api/support-messages/unread-count. Frontend: CoachEmailComposer opens via [data-testid='cab-email'] button in Support Pod action bar, MessagesPage at /messages shows threads and conversation view with reply. Timeline events: support_message_sent and support_message_reply logged to pod_action_events.

feature_coverage.send_message_api: PASS - POST /api/support-messages creates thread+message, returns thread_id
feature_coverage.inbox_api: PASS - GET /api/support-messages/inbox returns threads with unread_count per thread and total_unread
feature_coverage.thread_view_api: PASS - GET /api/support-messages/thread/{id} returns messages, marks as read
feature_coverage.reply_api: PASS - POST /api/support-messages/{id}/reply adds message to thread, updates metadata
feature_coverage.unread_count_api: PASS - GET /api/support-messages/unread-count returns count for badge
feature_coverage.timeline_logging: PASS - support_message_sent and support_message_reply events logged to pod timeline
feature_coverage.idempotency: PASS - Sending with existing thread_id adds to thread instead of creating new
feature_coverage.frontend_send_modal: PASS - Coach opens Support Pod → clicks Email button → CoachEmailComposer modal → fill subject+body → Send Message → toast success
feature_coverage.frontend_messages_page: PASS - /messages shows thread list → click thread → conversation view → reply box → send reply works
feature_coverage.messages_nav_item: PASS - Messages nav item in sidebar for athlete role with unread badge (polled every 60s)
feature_coverage.route_access: PASS - /messages route accessible for athlete, parent, club_coach, director roles per App.js

note: Resend email notification may not actually send in test/sandbox mode (MOCKED behavior in non-prod). All message storage is real MongoDB.
